azure-hpc-education-webinar.title: Azure HPC for Education Webinar
azure-hpc-education-webinar.summary: How Microsoft tools and innovation are unlocking cloud-scale HPC to accelerate discovery.
azure-hpc-education-webinar.subtitle: How Microsoft tools and innovation are unlocking cloud-scale HPC to accelerate discovery.
azure-hpc-education-webinar.overview: Join Oakwood and Microsoft for a practical walkthrough of modern HPC patterns on Azure for research and education teams.Join Oakwood and Microsoft for a practical walkthrough of modern HPC patterns on Azure for research and education teams.Join Oakwood and Microsoft for a practical walkthrough of modern HPC patterns on Azure for research and education teams.Join Oakwood and Microsoft for a practical walkthrough of modern HPC patterns on Azure for research and education teams.Join Oakwood and Microsoft for a practical walkthrough of modern HPC patterns on Azure for research and education teams.Join Oakwood and Microsoft for a practical walkthrough of modern HPC patterns on Azure for research and education teams.Join Oakwood and Microsoft for a practical walkthrough of modern HPC patterns on Azure for research and education teams.

manufacturers-modernize-webinar.title: Manufacturers modernize Webinar
manufacturers-modernize-webinar.summary: A practical roadmap to modern platforms, data, and AI for manufacturing teams.
manufacturers-modernize-webinar.location: 1001 Craig Road, Suite 305, St. Louis, MO 63146
manufacturers-modernize-webinar.subtitle: A practical roadmap to modern platforms, data, and AI for manufacturing teams.
manufacturers-modernize-webinar.overview: Learn how manufacturers are reducing downtime, improving quality, and increasing throughput using cloud-native operations.
learnings: Prioritize modernization initiatives with clear ROI.
Connect production data for real-time visibility.
Enable predictive maintenance with AI and analytics.
manufacturers-modernize-webinar.aboutSession: A focused session for operations leaders and IT teams navigating legacy constraints while scaling innovation.

high-performance-computing-webinar.title: High Performance Computing (HPC) Webinar
high-performance-computing-webinar.summary: Best practices for secure, high-throughput HPC deployments in Azure.
high-performance-computing-webinar.subtitle: Best practices for secure, high-throughput HPC deployments in Azure.
high-performance-computing-webinar.overview: Understand the architecture decisions required for modern HPC, from networking and storage to orchestration and governance.
learnings: Select the right compute profiles for workload patterns.
Design for performance, resilience, and observability.
Accelerate adoption with a phased migration approach.
high-performance-computing-webinar.aboutSession: Ideal for enterprise architects and platform teams building next-generation compute capabilities.
